risks.detail: High retry rate (40.0%) may indicate prompt degradation

recommendations.description: High retry rate detected. Review and optimize agent prompts to improve first-pass success rate.
recommendations.action: Improve Planner prompt with clearer instructions and stricter output format requirements.

recommendations.description: Add pre-execution validation for Architect outputs to catch errors before coder execution.
Agent failure rate is 40.0% (4/10). High failure rates may indicate systemic issues requiring manual intervention.
recommendations.action: Escalate repeated failures to human review. Consider increasing memory importance threshold for recurring failures.

recommendations.description: High retry rate (40.0%) may indicate prompt degradation. Prompts may need updating to maintain effectiveness.
recommendations.action: Review all agent prompts for clarity, completeness, and alignment with current task complexity.
